# Attention

Attention lets a model weigh different parts of the input when producing each
output token. It is the core mechanism behind the [[concepts/transformers]]
architecture. See [[entities/vaswani]] for the originating authors.

[^1]: vaswani2017/attention-is-all-you-need.md, p. 4
